title: cynophalla polyantha
intro: Cynophalla polyantha, also known as the "Snake Gourd" or "Calabash", is a climbing vine native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa, characterized by its long, curved fruits and fragrant flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. Cynophalla polyantha has been reported to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
